node.statement: EXISTS (PARTIAL) — Quantum Arithmetic (src/types/qint.jl): Has ripple-carry addition, subtraction, and comparison. MISSING for this paper: (1) modular arithmetic (mod m^d operations in Lemma 19 for permutation P_c), (2) integer division (floor(k/N_b) in Algorithm 1), (3) reversible classical computation framework for implementing oracles O_r, O_c, O_A from classical descriptions. The paper needs comparators (EXISTS) and increment operations with carry (PARTIAL — has carry-in addition but not general increment).
